memory.summary: A friend invited me to lunch, creating a social opportunity that conflicts with my current plan to finish the assignment analysis before reading.
My assignment progress is steady at 0.58, but the friend's message indicates a group lunch is happening now, creating an immediate social opportunity.
I worked for 2.5 hours, raising progress to 0.76, but the analysis section is due in under an hour and remains unfinished.
I made minimal progress on the analysis section in the last 18 minutes, leaving it unfinished with less than an hour until the deadline.
The analysis section deadline passed at 18:00 while I was only at 79% progress, meaning I have failed to submit this part on time despite working since 15:00.
I missed the assigned reading deadline at 20:00 with zero progress, though I did advance my course assignment analysis section to 88% before its own deadline passed.
Despite missing multiple deadlines, I made slight progress on the analysis section today, though my stress remains high and sleep debt is accumulating.
I made a tiny 1% progress on the analysis section after missing its deadline, but I am still behind and carrying high stress with accumulated sleep debt.
After missing the reading deadline, I made a small 3% progress on the assignment analysis section despite high stress and significant sleep debt.
I continued working on the analysis section, pushing progress to 97% despite high stress and two hours of sleep debt.
After 30 minutes of work, the analysis section is now at 98% complete. I remain critically low on energy and stressed, but the task is nearly finished.
The analysis section is now fully complete after 0.5 hours of work, but I am still exhausted with zero energy and two hours of sleep debt.
